comment: Boss content for the first floors. Skills are DETERMINISTIC scalar pacing modulations applied by CombatSim every TICK (live) and mirrored verbatim into simulate_offline — never a party-wipe model. Five primitives: enrage (clear threshold ramps after a delay, capped), shield (periodic windows where party DPS is multiplied by `leak`), regen (boss recovers a fraction of its pool per second), adds (a one-time HP bump once damage crosses a fraction of the pool). Two generic kits (miniboss = lighter, boss = fuller) parameterized by floor via HP/stage growth; per-floor bespoke kits are a later content pass. Names are indexed by floor (wraps past 10).

miniboss.comment: Light pacing: a slow enrage and a short periodic shield. Always clears well within the cap at on-curve DPS.

boss.comment: Fuller kit: stronger enrage, a longer/harder shield, slow regen, and one adds wave at 55% damage. Tuned so net progress per shield-period stays positive at on-curve DPS; the cap force-clears the grossly underleveled.
